name: popl-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for POPL submissions: venue fit for semantics/types/verification work, HotCRP submission under the 25-page acmsmall cap, full double-blind hygiene, author response, conditional-acceptance revision, mechanized-proof artifact evaluation, PACMPL Issue POPL camera-ready, and the July-to-January campaign calendar. Grounded in the POPL 2027 CFP, popl27.sigplan.org dates, POPL artifact-evaluation track pages, PACMPL on the ACM Digital Library, and dblp, checked on 2026-07-08.
